title: Dancing Feet
writer: Jerome Chodorov, Olive Cooper, Wellyn Totman
actors: Ben Lyon, Joan Marsh, Edward J. Nugent
plot: Peyton Wells (Ben Lyon) rescues Judy Jones (Joan Marsh) from a very dull young man, at a sedate party given for her by her multi-millionaire grandfather Silas P. Jones (Purnell Pratt.) Judy refuses to accompany Peyton on a slummin...
